# Mentira FC

> Mentira FC is the public website for an amateur football club, with news, roster, staff, matches, standings, galleries and institutional content.

This site is a React and Vite single-page app backed by Sanity as a headless CMS. Sanity content is normalized through typed web data services before it reaches the UI.

Use this file as a concise map for AI assistants. It complements `robots.txt` and any sitemap, but it is not a replacement for either.

## Public Sections

- [/](./): Home page with the main club presentation, featured content and key sports widgets.
- [/noticias](./noticias): Club news and editorial updates.
- [/plantel](./plantel): Players and staff profiles.
- [/tabla](./tabla): Standings and tournament context.
- [/historial](./historial): Match history and results.
- [/galeria](./galeria): Club image galleries.

## Content Model

- News: editorial posts and rich content.
- Players: roster profiles and player attributes.
- Staff: technical staff and collaborators.
- Teams: rival teams and club references.
- Games: fixtures, results, rivals and tournament links.
- Events: match events such as goals and related player data.
- Tournaments: competitions, standings and prize slot rules.
- Organizations: tournament organizers.
- Galleries: image collections.

## Technical Context

- Web app: React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS and TanStack React Query.
- CMS: Sanity Studio.
- Quality checks: ESLint, TypeScript, Vitest, production build and Lighthouse CI.
- Public metadata: dynamic document title, meta description, Open Graph and Twitter tags are handled in the SPA where browser-side metadata is available.

## Optional

- [AI agent setup](https://github.com/tomasbranca/MentiraFC_Page/blob/main/docs/AI_AGENT_SETUP.md): Repo-specific MCP, skill and agent workflow notes for developers.
- [Data model](https://github.com/tomasbranca/MentiraFC_Page/blob/main/DATA_MODEL.md): Current Sanity documents, relationships and roadmap notes.
